name: aegis-signal
description: Aegis Signal — Crypto Market Intelligence Platform
//overrides: ONE ioredis in the tree. BullMQ bundles its own, and two copies means two connection pools and two incompatible sets of types — a client that typechecks against one and is handed to the other. Pinned to what BullMQ resolves, because BullMQ is the one with an opinion.
//onlyBuiltDependencies: pnpm 10 blocks postinstall scripts by default. These are the ones we genuinely need: Prisma downloads its query engine, esbuild and sharp fetch native binaries. Everything else stays blocked.
